text: An act which *cannot* be termed as a piracy attack is:

options.text: Armed robbery on the high seas
Impeding safe navigation of a vessel due to close quarters engine defects
Intentional boarding to capture crew hostages
Seizure of cargo assets via gun threat

explanation: Piracy, by definition in UNCLOS, involves illegal acts of violence or detention committed for private ends by the crew or passengers of a private ship. Impeding navigation due to engine defects is an operational issue or accident, not an act of piracy or armed robbery.
